prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The document pertains specifically to the regulation of social housing and landlords in regions within England, as it references Yorkshire and Humberside. There are no indications that the regulations discussed apply to Scotland, which has its own regulatory frameworks for housing.
